name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl and Sopi operator backend v5.63: fixes the operator-provision 502. The invitations table has inviterId NOT NULL, but self-service provisioning (the Zapier signup path) creates invites with no human inviter, so the null inviterId threw a NOT NULL constraint error AFTER the operator row was written, killing the request with no response (surfacing as a platform 502 while still leaving an operator created). Self-service invites now use a system sentinel inviter, and the provision writes are wrapped so any storage failure returns a clean 500 with a logged reason instead of a silent 502. Cumulative over v5.62.
